value.found_quote: model	No	Model to use: sonnet, opus, haiku, fable, a full model ID (for example, claude-opus-4-8), or inherit. Defaults to inherit
value.rationale: The page explicitly documents a `model` frontmatter field for subagents that controls which AI model the subagent runs on, accepting aliases, full model IDs, or inherit. This directly substantiates the claim of "Model per subagent."
